class.name: DPITexture
class.brief_description: An automatically scalable [Texture2D] based on an SVG image.
class.description: An automatically scalable [Texture2D] based on an SVG image. [DPITexture]s are used to automatically re-rasterize icons and other texture based UI theme elements to match viewport scale and font oversampling. See also [member ProjectSettings.display/window/stretch/mode] ("canvas_items" mode) and [member Viewport.oversampling_override].

method.name: create_from_string
method.description: Creates a new [DPITexture] and initializes it by allocating and setting the SVG data from string.

method.name: force_update_texture
method.description: Forces the texture to update immediately. Normally, texture updates are deferred until the end of the current frame to avoid redundant expensive updates. Calling this method applies any pending changes right away instead of waiting. [b]Note:[/b] If you call [method force_update_texture] manually, the engine will detect that the texture has already been refreshed and will not perform an additional deferred update at the end of the frame.

method.name: get_scaled_rid
method.description: Returns the [RID] of the texture rasterized to match the oversampling of the currently drawn canvas item.

method.name: set_size_override
method.description: Resizes the texture to the specified dimensions.

method.name: set_source
method.description: Sets SVG source code. [b]Note:[/b] Changes are applied at the end of the current frame for performance reasons. See [method force_update_texture] to update immediately.

members.member: Texture scale. [code]1.0[/code] is the original SVG size. Higher values result in a larger image. [b]Note:[/b] Changes are applied at the end of the current frame for performance reasons. See [method force_update_texture] to update immediately.

If set, remaps texture colors according to [Color]-[Color] map. [b]Note:[/b] Changes are applied at the end of the current frame for performance reasons. See [method force_update_texture] to update immediately.
Overrides texture saturation. [b]Note:[/b] Changes are applied at the end of the current frame for performance reasons. See [method force_update_texture] to update immediately.
